---
title: ""
page-layout: article
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    title-block: false
---

<div class="hcc-contact-page">
  <h2>Contact</h2>
  <p>For research, consulting, or speaking opportunities:</p>
  <p class="contact-inline">
    <a href="mailto:yulia@hai-light.com">yulia@hai-light.com</a>
    <a class="contact-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yuliatyukhova/" target="_blank" aria-label="LinkedIn">
      <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
    </a>
  </p>
  <p>#lighting #illumination #engineering #experiments #research #lightingcalculations #measurements #software #technicalwriting #leadership #presentation #education</p>
</div>
